title: The Lotteries (Regulation) Act, 1998
full_text: The Lotteries (Regulation) Act, 1998 लाटरी (विनियमन) अधिनियम, 1998 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199817 Act Number: 17 Enactment Date: 1998-07-07 Act Year: 1998 Short Title: The Lotteries (Regulation) Act, 1998 Hindi Title: लाटरी (विनियमन) अधिनियम, 1998 Long Title: An Act to regulate the lotteries and to provide for matters connected therewith and incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Home Enforcement Date: 02-10-1997 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Lotteries (Regulation) Act, 1998 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Prohibition of lotteries. Section 4. Conditions subject to which lotteries may be organised, etc. Section 5. Prohibition of sale of ticket in a State. Section 6. Prohibition of organisation, etc., of lottery. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Penalty. Section 8. Offences to be cognizable and non-bailable. Section 9. Offences by companies. Section 10. Power to give directions. Section 11. Power of Central Government to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Power of State Government to make rules. Section 13. Repeal and saving.
